{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Legion ships
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Legion ships]] were crushed during the battle.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
